sections.paragraph: [pl. פְּרָאִים], (once פֶּרֶה Jer 2:24), comm. (m. Psa 104:11, f. Jer 2:24), a wild ass, so called from its running (as it is a very swift animal), Gen 16:12 Job 6:5 11:12 24:5 39:5 . Syn. is עָרֹוד. See also Bochart, Hieroz. i. 3, c. 16; Rosenm. Bibl. Alterth. iv. 2, p. 158. An engraving of this animal (which is now very rare in Western Asia) has of late been given in Ker Porter’s Travels, i. 459.
